web.title: Exploring Porsche's Sound Systems: Bose vs. Burmester
web.description: On 911 models, the Bose system has 12 speakers and the addition of SoundTrue technology. The Cayenne has a 14-speaker high performance audio ...
web.markdown:
# Exploring Porsche’s Sound Systems: Bose vs. Burmester

If you’re a true audiophile, then you may want to upgrade your audio system.

![](https://a.storyblok.com/f/329189/800x400/b8de4bf4d7/porsches-sound-system-santa-clara-ca.jpg/m/1920x0/filters:quality(75))

Sep 20, 2025

[Porsche sound systems](https://stevenscreek.porsche.com/en/service) from Bose and Burmester transform your vehicle into a world-class sound machine so you can enjoy everything from classic symphonies to the latest pop tracks with stunning clarity.

Both of these audio systems are available upgrades for modern Porsche vehicles as a replacement for the sound system that comes as part of your vehicle’s standard equipment. Upgrading your audio system can be done when you order a new Porsche model so you can enjoy incredible sound quality as soon as your Porsche is delivered, or you can ask your Porsche Center to upgrade your vehicle anytime after you buy it.

## **Available Bose Systems**

The Bose premium sound system available for your Porsche will depend on your model. For the 718 Boxster, a 10-speaker system with AudioPilot, SurroundStage, and a 5.1 digital signal is available. On 911 models, the Bose system has 12 speakers and the addition of SoundTrue technology. The Cayenne has a 14-speaker high performance audio system, while the Macan EV builds on the available 14-speaker Bose system with Perceptual Sound Rendering.

AudioPilot is a focal point of the premium Bose sound system and serves as an active noise cancellation system to reduce road, wind, and engine noise while you drive. Sound systems with SoundTrue technology automatically enhance the clarity of compressed music formats, such as if you are playing an MP3 file from your Bluetooth-enabled device.

## **Available Burmester Systems**

The Burmester High-End Surround Sound System is an ideal option for drivers who want a fully immersive sound experience. This 21-speaker system is crafted with 3D sound technology to maximize the quality of the 1,455-watt system. One highlight of this system is the Air Motion Transformer, a system that increases the treble range to produce crystal clear sound quality.

## **Why Should You Upgrade Your Sound System?**

The main reason drivers upgrade their audio system is to enjoy better sound quality. High-performance speakers allow you to hear every facet of your music selection so you can enjoy deep bass lines, undercurrent melodies, and sharper high notes. Better sound quality creates a more enjoyable listening experience, which can have a direct impact on how much you enjoy long trips.

It’s also worth considering that upgrading your sound system now can increase the value of your vehicle, which may be an advantage when you trade in your Porsche for a new model in the future.

Whether you go with Bose or Burmester, you can enjoy incredible sound quality and clarity by upgrading your Porsche’s standard stereo system. Ask about available speakers for your Porsche when you [call Porsche Stevens Creek in Santa Clara, CA.](https://stevenscreek.porsche.com/en/contact)

web.description: Since the introduction of the Burmester High-End Surround Sound System in the Porsche Panamera, Burmester has been considered a benchmark for factory-integrated ...
web.markdown:
# Burmester Sound   Systems and   Porsche

#### BURMESTER MEETS PORSCHE

## High standards on both sides

Since the introduction of the Burmester High-End Surround Sound System in the Porsche Panamera, Burmester has been considered a benchmark for factory-integrated car hi-fi systems. The Burmester High-End Surround Sound System was the first car audio system ever to receive the “Image Hifi Award”. The partnership was continued successfully with the Porsche Cayenne, the 911 Carrera, the Boxster, the Cayman, and 918 Spyder. With the next generation of Porsche Panamera, Burmester entered an entirely new sound dimension of listening quality, which can also be experienced in the Porsche Cayenne and Porsche Taycan.

#### HIGHLIGHTS

## The special features of the   Burmester sound systems

### Auro 3D

With the Auro 3D function, additional speakers in the A-pillar significantly expand the spatiality of music reproduction. This acoustically removes the boundaries of the passenger compartment, with a sound stage that is created in front of the occupants above the dashboard.

The immersive sound is made possible for any format or genre of music thanks to Auro-Matic®.

### AMT-Tweeter

With the AMT-Tweeter function, additional speakers in the A-pillar significantly expand the spatiality of music reproduction. This acoustically removes the boundaries of the passenger compartment, with a sound stage that is created in front of the occupants above the dashboard.

The immersive sound is made possible for any format or genre of music thanks to Auro-Matic®.

### Hybrid amplifier

Another unique selling point in the market is the use of powerful yet efficient hybrid amplifiers. We have utilised our decades of experience in analog amplification in the home audio sector into the automotive field. Analog amplification and filters for the high and mid-range are combined with digital amplification in the low-frequency range – for a warm, natural, detailed but at the same time powerful sound.​

#### TECHNICAL DETAILS

## Burmester 3D High-End   Surround Sound System

![](https://www.burmester.de/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/3x2_Bur_Web_Por_Cayenne-2-1024x683.jpg)

#### Burmester 3D High-End Surround Sound System

### Cayenne

|     |
| --- |
| 21 speaker incl. subwoofer, each driven by its own amplifier channel |
| 1.455 watt system output incl. 400 Watt active subwoofer |
| 2-way-center for homogenous staging |
| Auro-3D® spatial reproduction through Auro-Matic® technology |

[~~learn more~~](https://www.burmester.de/en/automotive/porsche/cayenne/)

![](https://www.burmester.de/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/3x2_Macan4_05-1024x683.jpg)

#### Burmester 3D High-End Surround Sound System

### Macan Electric

|     |
| --- |

| 2-way-center for homogenous staging |
| Auro-3D® spatial reproduction through Auro-Matic® technology |

[~~learn more~~](https://www.burmester.de/en/automotive/porsche/macan/)

#### BURMESTER 3D HIGH-END SURROUND SOUND SYSTEM

## Tutorial

In this tutorial video, we showcase step-by-step how to set up the Burmester 3D High-End Surround Sound System, which is available in vehicles made by Porsche.

#### TECHNISCHE DETAILS

## Burmester High-End   Surround Sound System

![](https://www.burmester.de/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/3x2_Bur_Web_Por_911-Targa-4-GTS-1024x683.jpg)

#### Burmester High-End Surround Sound System

### 911

|     |
| --- |
| 13 speaker, each driven by its own amplifier channel |
| 915 watt system output incl. 300 Watt active subwoofer |
| 2-way-center for homogenous staging |

[~~learn more~~](https://www.burmester.de/en/automotive/porsche/911/)

![](https://www.burmester.de/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/3x2_Bur_Web_Por_718-Boxster-Style-1024x683.jpg)

#### Burmester High-End Surround Sound System

### 718

|     |
| --- |
| 12 speaker, each driven by its own amplifier channel |
| 821 watt system output incl. 300 Watt active subwoofer |
|  |

[~~learn more~~](https://www.burmester.de/en/automotive/porsche/718/)

![](https://www.burmester.de/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/3x2_Bur_Web_Por_911-Targa-4-GTS_01-600x400.jpg|https://www.burmester.de/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/3x2_Bur_Web_Por_911-Targa-4-GTS_01-1000x666.jpg)

#### BURMESTER HIGH-END SURROUND SOUND SYSTEM

## Tutorial

In this tutorial video, we showcase step-by-step how to set up the Burmester High-End Surround Sound System, which is available in vehicles made by Porsche.

#### BURMESTER IN PORSCHE

## Features

### Pure

The Pure function enables unadulterated sound reproduction without additional effects for the purest music enjoyment.

### Smooth

The Smooth preset ensures relaxed long-term listening pleasure by subtly lowering overemphasized frequency components in the mids and highs.

### Live

The Live function gives every music aspect a thrilling soundscape that puts you in the middle of a live concert experience.

### Sound Conditioner

The Sound Conditioner ensures a constant listening experience in every driving situation. It subtly adjusts the sound depending on influencing noises – for unadulterated music enjoyment.

### Surround

With its complex algorithmic the Surround preset generates a virtual surround sound by increasing the spatial effect.

### Auro 3D Intensity

This setting allows you to choose the preferred level of spatial sound intensity.

### Listening position

The optimal sound for the respective listening position can be individually focused here.

### Sound Enhancer

The Sound Enhancer enables optimised listening pleasure from sources with reduced data rates and restores corresponding audio signals very carefully. This way, compressed music formats benefit significantly in terms of playback quality.
